name: Willard's Country Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Shape into eight 4-inch diameter patties.
3. Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add sausage patties, four at a time, and cook until browned, about five minutes per side.
5. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towel.
6. Keep warm while cooking remaining patties.
7. Discard fat.
Per Serving: 275 CAL., 19 g. PROTEIN, 22 g. FAT, 1 g. CARB, 607 mg. SOD
